title: Peppery Crunchy Greek Olive Spread
description: A flavorful spread with a perfect blend of peppery flavors and crunchiness that pairs well with crackers or toast.

ingredients.name: 2 cups pitted Kalamata olives
ingredients.notes: Use Kalamata olives for their natural brine and flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons maple syrup
ingredients.notes: To balance the acidity and provide sweetness.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground black pepper
ingredients.notes: For added flavor and to enhance the peppery taste.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons capers, rinsed and drained
ingredients.notes: Adds a tangy, salty note to complement the other ingredients.

instructions: Mix together pitted Kalamata olives, chopped parsley, garlic, red wine vinegar, maple syrup, black pepper, and toasted walnuts in a large bowl.
Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed and the mixture is homogenous.
Add drained capers to the mixture and stir gently to incorporate them into the spread.
Transfer the olive spread to an airtight container for storage. It can be served as a snack or used on crackers, toast, or bagels.
